data.name: Furry Reich 🐺
data.detailed_description:
🐺Furry Reich 🐺

。

进入毛茸茸的帝国🐺的世界，发现一个关于爱和勇敢的感人故事。作为军队中的一名毛茸茸的军官，你将与你的爱人踏上浪漫的旅程，面对军事生活和爱情的挑战和胜利。穿上你美丽的、设计精巧的制服，让自己沉浸在一个有着令人惊叹的图形和令人惊叹的景色的世界中。凭借其温暖人心的叙述、浪漫的主题和华丽的视觉效果，《毛茸茸的帝国》是一个令人难忘的游戏体验，它将温暖你的心，点燃爱情的火焰。加入毛茸茸的爱的行列，今天就入伍吧!

Furry Reich 🐺是一个关于毛茸茸的女孩和匹配3游戏的故事集。一款令人兴奋的游戏，由一系列精彩的迷你小说组成，有毛茸茸的女孩。轻松的游戏玩法和可爱的氛围。含有关于不同职业的迷你故事与🐺毛茸茸的女孩🐺。

游戏的玩法让我们回到了经典的匹配3游戏（Match3），但游戏的核心是

特点：

[列表]
  • - 27关
  • - 4个可爱的毛茸茸的女孩
  • - 3个连续的

通过

data.short_description: 毛茸茸的帝国🐺是一款温暖人心的浪漫游戏，它将带你进入军队中毛茸茸的军官之旅。与你的同伴相爱，并携手应对军事生活的挑战。轻松的游戏玩法和可爱的氛围。
data.supported_languages: 英文, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 日文, 韓文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙, 羅馬尼亞文, 俄文, 簡體中文, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲, 繁體中文, 烏克蘭文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 8/10/11
  • 處理器: 2 Ghz Dual Core
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Graphics card supporting DirectX 9.0c
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間

data.name: Furry Reich 🐺
data.detailed_description:
This is a satirical humorous visual novel. The goal is to show the meaninglessness of war and radical views. Everyone is worthy of love. Make love Not War. We love you :3

🐺Furry Reich 🐺


Enter the world of the Furry Reich 🐺 and discover a touching story of love and bravery. As a furry officer in the army, you'll embark on a romantic journey with your beloved, facing the challenges and triumphs of military life and love. Don your beautiful and intricately designed uniform and immerse yourself in a world of stunning graphics and breathtaking vistas. With its heartwarming narrative, romantic themes, and gorgeous visuals, Furry Reich is an unforgettable gaming experience that will warm your heart and ignite the flames of love. Join the ranks of the furries in love and enlist today!

Furry Reich 🐺 is a collection of stories about Furry Girls and match 3 gameplay. An exciting game consisting of a series of exciting mini-novels with fluffy girls. Relaxing gameplay and cute atmosphere. Contains mini stories about different professions with 🐺furry girls🐺

The gameplay takes us back to the classic match-3 game (Match3), but at the heart of the game

Features:

  • - 25 levels
  • - 4 Lovely Furry Girls
  • - 3 in a row

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS *: Windows 8/10/11
  • Processor: 2 Ghz Dual Core
